products.title: Hartman Amalfi Lounger in Bronze
products.body_html:
Combining an elegant, stylised design with classic curves and a solid, smooth finish the Amalfi lounger is a great choice for ultimate relaxation. It has four adjustable tilting positions and functional wheels - so you can really seek the sun or slip into the shade. This cast aluminium lounger can by left outside in all seasons and still look beautiful in years to come. Supplied with a full-length luxury Weatherready® cushion our Amalfi lounger will be difficult to resist on a hot day. A truly fabulous addition to your garden and coordinates perfectly with the full Amalfi collection especially our Amalfi side table.

  • Weatherready® cushions are hardwearing & easy to clean, store away in Autumn & Winter
  • Cushions have ties to secure into place
  • Require simple home assembly - all fittings supplied
  • Crafted from coated cast aluminium; rust free, lightweight, strong, durable & low maintenance
  • The furniture can be left outside all year round - except cushions
  • Protect and extend the life of your furniture by using a cover - remove cushions if being covered for prolonged periods (to prevent mould and mildew build-up)
  • Five-year limited manufacturer warranty
  • Finish: Bronze
  • Cushion: Amber

products.title: Hartman Arley 3 Seat Lounge Set
products.body_html:
Transform your outdoor space with the stylish and versatile Arley 3-Seat Lounge Set, designed for both relaxation and dining. Crafted with durable, handwoven resin weave in a natural finish, this set combines timeless aesthetics with everyday functionality. The spacious 3-seat sofa, two armchairs, and two cushioned stools offer generous seating comfort with deep, Weatheready® cushions in a soft neutral tone. At the heart of the set is the adjustable-height dining table, easily raised for meals or lowered for casual lounging—perfect for seamless transitions from daytime gatherings to cozy evening relaxation

GOOD TO KNOW

  • Table top is Driftwood Folie—wood look foiled aluminium
  • Weatherready® Cushions are hardwearing & easy to clean, store away in Autumn & Winter
  • Adjustable feet to ensure perfect positioning on uneven surfaces
  • Easy adjust function to alter table height, simply lift, slide and click into place
  • Hand woven resin weave combined with an aluminium frame - lightweight, strong, rust free and low maintenance
  • Requires simple self-assembly - all fittings supplied
  • The furniture can be left outside all year round - except cushions
  • FREE Fabric cleaner and Fabric protector included
  • Protect and extend the life of your furniture by using a cover - remove cushions if being covered for prolonged periods (to prevent mould and mildew build-up)
  • Three year limited manufacturer warranty - Register your warranty to extend to a five year warranty
  • Set includes: 1 x Rectangular Adjustable Dining Table, 1 x 3-Seat Sofa, 2 x Lounge Chairs, 2 x Stools
  • Frame: Latte
  • Weave: Ashen
  • Cushion: Biscotti
  • Folie Top: Driftwood

products.title: Hartman Rio 2 Seat Lounge Set
products.body_html:
Bringing both comfort and style to your garden, the Rio 2 Seat Lounge Set is the perfect addition to any outdoor space. This set features a sleek coffee table made from lightweight, powder-coated taupe aluminium, topped with an elegant patina Tuscan Ceramic Glass tabletop that adds a touch of sophistication. The cosy two-seat sofa and two inviting lounge chairs come with luxurious pewter Weatherready® cushions that are not only easy to clean but also designed to withstand the unpredictable British weather conditions, ensuring durability and longevity. Whether you are seeking a peaceful moment alone or planning a night in with friends, the Rio 2 Seat Lounge Set offers the ideal setting to relax and enjoy your garden.

GOOD TO KNOW

  • Tuscan Ceramic Glass is both practical and beautiful, tempered for safety, easy to clean, heat and scratch resistant
  • Weatherready® cushions are hardwearing & easy to clean, store away in Autumn & Winter
  • Crafted from aluminium; rust free, lightweight, strong, durable & low maintenance
  • Set requires simple self-assembly - all fittings supplied
  • The furniture can be left outside all year round - except cushions
  • Protect and extend the life of your furniture by using a cover - remove cushions if being covered for prolonged periods (to prevent mould and mildew build-up)
  • Three years limited manufacturer warranty - Register your warranty to extend to a five year warranty
  • Set includes: 1 x Rectangular Coffee Table, 1 x 2 Seat Sofa & 2 x Lounge Chairs, Free Fabric Cleaner, Free Fabric Protector
  • Frame: Taupe
  • Fabric: Pewter
  • Table Top: Patina

products.title: Hartman Rio 6 Seat Rectangular Dining Set
products.body_html:
Transform your outdoor space into a haven of style and comfort with the Rio 6 Seat Dining Set. This exquisite set is designed to elevate your dining experience with a perfect blend of elegance and sophistication. The set features six unique pewter sling dining chairs, designed for maximum comfort, allowing you to relax and enjoy long meals with family and friends. Crafted with a robust taupe powder-coated aluminum frame, it ensures durability and resistance to the elements. At the center of this set is a six-seat rectangular dining table, beautifully paired with a patina Tuscan Ceramic Glass tabletop that is tempered for both safety and durability. The ceramic coated glass surface is easy to clean and maintain, ensuring your dining area always looks pristine. To enhance your outdoor experience, the set includes a 3m Round Luxe Parasol and a 15kg base, allowing you to comfortably dine even on the sunniest days. Its timeless design and superior craftsmanship make it a standout addition to any patio or garden. Its elegant aesthetic seamlessly blends with various outdoor areas, creating a cohesive and inviting atmosphere. Embrace the outdoors, enjoy alfresco dining with family and friends, and create memorable moments with your loved ones.

GOOD TO KNOW

  • Tuscan Ceramic Glass is both practical and beautiful, tempered for safety, easy to clean, heat and scratch resistant
  • Sling Chairs are hardwearing & easy to clean
  • Adjustable table feet to ensure perfect positioning on uneven surfaces
  • Crafted from aluminium; rust free, lightweight, strong, durable & low maintenance
  • Seating comes fully assembled
  • Table requires simple self-assembly - all fittings supplied
  • The furniture can be left outside all year round
  • Protect and extend the life of your furniture by using a cover
  • Three years limited manufacturer warranty - Register your warranty to extend to a five year warranty
  • Set includes: 1 x Rectangular Dining Table, 6 x Sling Dining Chairs, 1 x 3m Round Luxe Parasol (UPF50+ Certified) & 15kg Concrete Base (not suitable on some composite decking - check with your manufacturer)
  • Always remove parasol from table if windy or unattended
  • Frame: Taupe
  • Sling: Pewter
  • Table Top: Patina
  • Parasol Canopy: Shell

products.title: Hartman Arley 6 Seat Rectangular Dining Set
products.body_html:
Bring contemporary elegance to your outdoor space with the Arley 6 Seat Rectangular Dining Set. Featuring a beautifully designed Folie-wood look foiled aluminium tabletop, with slatted design, combines the natural warmth of wood aesthetics with the durability and low maintenance of aluminium. The set includes six spacious dining chairs crafted from handwoven resin weave and fitted with luxurious Weatherready® cushions—designed to withstand the elements while offering lasting comfort. Perfect for stylish alfresco dining in any season.

products.title: Hartman Rayo 6 Seat Regis Teak Dining Set
products.body_html:
Elevate your outdoor entertaining with the Regis 6-Seat Rectangular Dining Set from the Rayo Collection. Crafted from premium solid teak, the spacious dining table features a beautifully grained surface and robust cross-leg design for timeless appeal and lasting durability. Six handwoven resin weave chairs, complete with plush grey cushions, offer the perfect blend of comfort and contemporary style. Ideal for patios, gardens, or sunrooms, this set provides an inviting space for alfresco dining and relaxed gatherings all year round.

GOOD TO KNOW

  • Table is natural Teak - allow teak to weather to a grey patina or treat with Hartman's Teak Cleaner and Teak Protector to retain original colour
  • This furniture can be left outside all year round
  • To protect and extend the life of your furniture please DO NOT cover any of our Teak sets.
  • Cushions are hardwearing & easy to clean, store away in Autumn & Winter
  • Hand woven resin weave combined with a reinforced aluminium frame - lightweight, strong, rust free and low maintenance
  • Requires simple self-assembly - all fittings supplied
  • The furniture can be left outside all year round - except cushions
  • Three year limited manufacturer warranty - Register your warranty to extend to a five year warranty
  • Set includes: 1 x Regis Teak Rectangular Dining Table, 6 x Dining Chairs
  • Frame: Carbon
  • Weave: Tawny
  • Cushion: Rhino
  • Table: Natural Teak

products.title: Hartman Arley Bistro Set
products.body_html:
Bring charm and comfort to your garden mornings or evening drinks with the Arley Bistro Set. Crafted from durable, weather-resistant resin weave with plush Weatherready® cushions, this set combines timeless style and everyday practicality. The generous square table foiled with our stunning Driftwood Folie—wood look foiled aluminium, is perfect for two to enjoy coffee, pastries, or intimate alfresco dining. Whether on a patio or balcony, the Arley Bistro Set transforms any outdoor space into a relaxing retreat.

products.body_html:

The set folds flat for effortless storage, making it a versatile choice for compact areas. Ideal for enjoying a quiet morning coffee or casual outdoor meals in comfort and style.

products.title: Hartman Amalfi High Back Bench in Bronze
products.body_html:
For a peaceful moment or a cosy coffee for two, the Amalfi High-back bench will provide the perfect excuse to sit in your garden. Whether you position under a shady spot or create a focal point, this attractive bench with elegant, classic curves with a smooth, solid finish comes complete with our permeable Weatherready® cushions that can be left outside all summer long, the furniture's durability means it can by left outside in all seasons and still look beautiful in years to come. This bench coordinates beautifully with all lounging and dining options in the full Amalfi collection.

products.body_html:
Morning coffee, afternoon tea, right though to a night cap under the stars. The Amalfi Bistro will quickly become a part of your outdoor living. Combining elegant, classic curves with a solid, smooth finish this two seat and table set can be left outside in all seasons and still look beautiful in years to come. This set coordinates beautifully with other dining and lounging options in the full Amalfi collection. Supplied with attractive Weatherready® cushions and supportive slanted backs, our Amalfi chairs will ensure many relaxing moments on your balcony, patio or favourite sunny spot.
